title: SLU student wins soloist award at ICCA regional competition
title_cn: 圣路易斯大学学生获国际大学生阿卡贝拉锦标赛区域赛最佳独唱奖

title: Saint Louis University Receives Grant to Fund Ignatian Colleagues Network
summary_en: Saint Louis University has received a $100,000 grant to support an ongoing formation program. The Ignatian Colleagues Network will build on the Ignatian Colleagues Program (ICP) launched in 2023 and provide a next step for those who have completed the intensive two-year mission formation program.
title_cn: 圣路易斯大学获拨款资助伊格内修斯同仁网络
